name: Hess Corporation
description: Hess Corporation is a leading global independent energy company engaged in the exploration and production of crude oil and natural gas. The company has a world-class portfolio of assets, with key operations in the Deepwater Gulf of Mexico, the Bakken shale play in North Dakota, the Joint Development Area in the Gulf of Thailand, and offshore Guyana. Hess is committed to meeting the world's growing energy needs in a safe, environmentally responsible, and socially sensitive manner.
